title: Before dawn, ancient drum rite wakes Istanbul faithful to fast
description: It’s 3:30 am and lights are slowly coming on in the homes lining a narrow Istanbul street as people are woken up by the rhythmic thump of a drum. Emerging onto a balcony, Sibel Sav...

title: Book Of The Day: Sun Tzu's The Art Of War - 5 Timeless Lessons From Ancient Chinese Philosopher
description: (MENAFN - Live Mint) In a world increasingly shaped by war and geopolitical tensions, Sun Tzu offers a classical realist perspective on how power can be built and exercised efficiently. Rather than ...

title: The Hidden Climate Cost of India’s Brick Kilns: How Ancient Construction Practices Are Poisoning South Asia’s Air
description: A comprehensive new study in Air Quality, Atmosphere & Health reveals how over 100,000 brick kilns across South Asia are driving a public health and climate crisis, contributing significantly to PM2.5 emissions, black carbon, and premature deaths across the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

title: What Does The Red ‘Flag Of Revenge’ Over Jamkaran Mosque in Qom Really Mean? Inside The Ancient Shia Tradition Invoked After Ali Khamenei’s Killing
description: A joint military strike by the United States and Israel has killed Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, marking a major escalation in the Middle East conflict.

title: Bhajan Lal Sharma Government Renames Three Rajasthan Cities Including Mount Abu, Restoring 'Ancient Identities'
description: The BJP government in Rajasthan has renamed three cities, with Mount Abu now to be called Abu Raj, Jahazpur as Yagyapur, and Kama as Kamvan. Chief Minister Bhajan Lal Sharma said the move honours heritage and public sentiment. The announcement was made during the Finance and Appropriation Bill debate in the Assembly.
